title: n8n MCP Browser HTTP transport accepts unauthenticated session init and tool invocation
description: When @n8n/mcp-browser is launched with the HTTP transport, the raw node:http request handler in server.ts accepts MCP session-initialization and tool-invocation requests with no authentication and an open CORS policy (Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *). The handler creates a new StreamableHTTPServerTransport and registers the full set of browser-control tools (navigation, JavaScript evaluation, cookie/storage access) for any caller, so any network-reachable client or any website the user visits can establish an MCP session and drive the user's real browser profile (CVSS 4.0 8.8).
